description: Primary fixed-time objective autoresearch metric. Every canonical case contributes through the same explicit math and equal weight.
weighting_note: All canonical objective cases currently use equal weight 1.0, so the primary metric is the arithmetic mean of the per-case normalized scores.

cases.explanation: Reference final score from the current hard-case fixed-time objective baseline.
